translations.**回到家時：** 自動關閉攝影機(為了隱私及防止誤觸看家警報，米家APP有BU:
**When arriving home:** Automatically turn off the camera (for privacy and to prevent accidental alarm triggers; the Mi Home app has a bug where the alarm cannot be turned on/off according to the set time), and turn on the Pro lamp on the desk (to avoid fumbling in the dark).  
**When leaving home:** Automatically turn on the camera (default to enable alarm mode) and turn off all lights.
translations.**最後結合上述攝影機的 config.json檔如下：**\n\n: **Finally, the combined config.json file for the above cameras is as follows:**
translations.**檯燈的設置到這裡即可，你可以保留這個APP控制檯燈或再重新綁定回米家．**\: **The desk lamp setup is complete here. You can keep using this app to control the lamp or rebind it back to the Mi Home app.**
translations.**當你下次離開/進入設定的區域範圍就會收到觸發的通知(一樣有約100公尺的誤差: **You will receive a triggered notification the next time you leave/enter the set area (with about a 100-meter margin of error). Tapping the notification will automatically execute the Mi Home scene!**
translations.*一定會有人想問為什麼不直接選「離開或到達某地」？，因為這功能根本沒用，他APP: *Some may ask why not directly choose "Leave or Arrive at a Location"? Because this feature is basically useless. The app is not optimized for GPS in Taiwan, and its location can only be set on landmarks. If your position matches that, you can use this feature directly. **You can skip the rest of the article!***
translations.*如果找不到米家請回到米家APP嘗試開關「我的」-&gt; 「實驗室功能」-&g: *If you can't find Mi Home, go back to the Mi Home app and try toggling "Me" -> "Lab Features" -> "iOS Shortcuts" -> "Add Mi Home Scenes to Shortcuts," then swipe away and reopen the "Shortcuts" app.

translations.1. Find the Home app (if not installed,:
1. Find the Home app (if not installed, search for "Home" in the App Store and install it)

2. Open the Home app

3. Tap the "+" icon at the top right to add a nearby device

4. Scan the HomeKit QR code on the bottom of the Pro lamp to add the accessory!
translations.1. Mijia Smart Camera PTZ Version 1080P:
1. Mijia Smart Camera PTZ Version 1080P (Supported: Mijia)

2. Mi Home Desk Lamp Pro (Supports: Apple HomeKit, Mi Home)

3. Mi Home LED Smart Desk Lamp (Supported by: Mi Home)

translations.1.將剛剛複製出來的 ZTOKEN貼在「Input Text」，選「Hex」\n:
1. Paste the copied ZTOKEN into "Input Text" and select "Hex".  
2. Enter the key as "00000000000000000000000000000000" (32 zeros), also select "Hex".  
3. Then press "Decrypt!" to convert.  
4. Select all, copy the text in the blue box at the bottom right, and remove spaces to get the desired **Token**.

translations.> Here, I tried using \"miio\" to sniff: > Here, I tried using "miio" to sniff the token directly, but it seems the Xiaomi camera firmware has been updated, making this method no longer a quick and easy way to get the token!
translations.HomeBridge透過使用Mac電腦作為橋接器，將不支援的裝置模擬成HomeK: HomeBridge uses a Mac computer as a bridge to simulate unsupported devices as HomeKit accessories, allowing them to be added to the "Home" app.
translations.HomeKit的設定介紹就到這邊了，再來講解米家原生智慧家庭的用法。\n\n: The introduction to HomeKit setup ends here. Next, let's explain how to use the native Mi Home smart system.

translations.Token 這邊有嘗試用「miio」直接嗅探的方式，但好像是米家攝影機韌體有更新: Here, I tried using "miio" to sniff the token directly, but it seems the firmware of the Xiaomi camera has been updated, making this method no longer a quick and easy way to get the token!
translations.Trigger 類型選「Location」-> Name 輸入名字(EX:回家): For the trigger type, select "Location" -> Enter a name (e.g., Home) in the Name field -> Click "Set Location" to set the location area -> Next, in REGION STATUS, choose whether it triggers when entering or leaving the area -> Finally, in SCENES, select the corresponding "scene" to execute (created above)

translations.```bash\nsudo homebridge restart\n```\n\:
```bash
sudo homebridge restart
```

translations.```bash\nsudo homebridge start\n```\n\n:
```bash
sudo homebridge start
```

translations.```bash\nsudo npm -g install homebridge:
```bash
sudo npm -g install homebridge --unsafe-perm
```

translations.p.s GPS會有約100公尺的誤差\n\n: p.s GPS has an error margin of about 100 meters
translations.一般常見的錯誤都是Token有錯，確認一下上面流程有無遺漏即可。\n\n: A common error is an incorrect Token. Just double-check if any steps in the above process were missed.
translations.上述一大堆的設定步驟，總結一下就是：\n\n: The lengthy setup steps above can be summarized as:
translations.下方也會有狀態訊息：\n[2019–7–4 23:45:03] [Mi Came:
Status messages will also appear below:
[2019–7–4 23:45:03] [Mi Camera] connecting to camera at 192.168.0.100…
[2019–7–4 23:45:03] [Mi Camera] current power state: off
translations.下載＆安裝後開啟APP -> 允許存取「家庭資料」-> 會看到「家庭」的資料配置:
After downloading and installing the app, open it -> Allow access to "Home Data" -> You will see the "Home" data setup -> Tap the "Settings" button at the top right -> Tap "My Home" to enter  
-> Scroll down to the "Triggers" section -> Tap "Add Trigger"
translations.也可從 [Apple Watch](../a2920e33e73e/) 上控制元:
You can also control devices from the [Apple Watch](../a2920e33e73e/)!
**If the watch app keeps showing a blank screen, please delete and reinstall the watch or phone app, as this app has quite a few bugs.**
translations.使用「Finder」->「前往」->「前往檔案夾」-> 輸入「~/.homebr: Use "Finder" -> "Go" -> "Go to Folder" -> enter "~/.homebridge" to navigate there.
translations.使用文字編輯器打開「config.json」，若沒有此檔案請自行建立一個或 [點: Open "config.json" with a text editor. If the file does not exist, please create one yourself or [click here to download](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1S67NZwXrVqOpps_Cl9l0494foDaHxuWF/view?usp=sharing){:target="_blank"} and place it directly inside.
translations.使用第三方的APP串接「家庭」加入自動化設定，就可以透過使用手機GPS定位來做到: Using third-party apps to connect with "Home" and add automation settings allows you to bypass restrictions on using the "Automation" tab by leveraging your phone's GPS location for automation.
translations.依照步驟新增場景情境，這裡以回家為例：\n\n: Add a new scene step by step, using "Coming Home" as an example:
translations.備份完成後， [下載](http://www.imactools.com/iph: After completing the backup, [download](http://www.imactools.com/iphonebackupviewer/download/mac){:target="_blank"} and install the backup viewer software: [iBackupViewer](http://www.imactools.com/iphonebackupviewer/download/mac){:target="_blank"}
translations.全都加好、橋接好後ㄧ樣打開「家庭」APP\n\n: After adding everything and completing the bridging, open the "Home" app as usual.
translations.其他設備：攝影機、Pro檯燈就直接照官方說明設定加入就好，這邊不在冗述．\n\n: Other devices: For the camera and Pro lamp, just follow the official instructions to set them up and add them, no need to elaborate here.
translations.其實我在選購時並沒有特別注意是否支援Apple HomeKit，身為一個iOS: Actually, I didn't pay much attention to whether the devices supported Apple HomeKit when I was shopping. As an iOS developer, that's really unprofessional of me because I never expected Xiaomi to support it.
translations.再來是米家 LED 智慧檯燈，由於不像Pro版有支援Apple HomeKit，: Next is the Mi LED Smart Desk Lamp. Since it doesn't support Apple HomeKit like the Pro version, we still need to add it using the HomeBridge method. Although the steps **do not require the complicated process of obtaining IP and Token**, making it simpler than the camera, the lamp has its own quirks. You need to pair it with another Yeelight APP and enable the local network control setting:
translations.再次打開「iBackupViewer」成功讀取到備份檔後，點擊右上角切換到「Tr: After reopening "iBackupViewer" and successfully loading the backup file, click the top right corner to switch to "Tree View" mode.
translations.切到第三個Tab「自動化」就可設定，很抱歉這邊沒有一個上述設備(iPad/App: Switch to the third tab "Automation" to set it up. Sorry, I don't have any of the mentioned devices (iPad/Apple TV/HomePod) to act as a **” [Home Hub](https://support.apple.com/zh-tw/HT207057){:target="_blank"} ”**, so I didn't explore this part.
translations.前面有提到 “HomeBridge就是透過使用Mac電腦作為橋接器，將不支援的裝: Earlier, it was mentioned that "HomeBridge uses a Mac computer as a bridge to simulate unsupported devices as HomeKit devices." **In fact, HomeBridge is just a platform, and each device requires additional HomeBridge plugins to be added.**
translations.加入配件成功後，在配件上重壓(3D TOUCH)/長壓，即可調整亮度、顏色。\n: After successfully adding the accessory, press firmly (3D TOUCH) or long press on the accessory to adjust brightness and color.
translations.即可在Siri中直接呼叫控制執行場景！\n\n: You can directly call and control scenes using Siri!
translations.即可看到原本不支援的米家 LED 智慧檯燈也加入HomeKit「家庭」APP囉！: You can now see the originally unsupported Mi LED Smart Desk Lamp added to the HomeKit "Home" app!
translations.原理好像是回到家，感應到 **”家庭中樞”** 手機/手錶即可精準觸發！\n\n: The principle seems to be that when you arrive home, the **"home hub"** detects your phone/watch and triggers precisely!
translations.可以看到一個重點就是 **你要有一台Mac電腦保持開機狀態，才能保持橋接通道順暢: One key point is **you need to keep a Mac computer powered on to maintain a smooth bridge connection**; if the computer is shut down or in sleep mode, you won't be able to control those HomeKit devices.
translations.可以看到所有米家APP上的裝置資訊欄位，向右滾動到尾端，找到 **ZTOKEN*: You can see all device information fields in the Mi Home app. Scroll to the far right and find the **ZTOKEN** field, then double-click to edit, select all, and copy.
translations.右上角點擊「+」-> 加入情境 -> 自訂 -> 配件名稱自行輸入(EX:回家): Tap the "+" at the top right -> Add Scene -> Custom -> Enter a name for the scene (e.g., Home) -> Tap "Add Accessories" below -> Select the connected HomeKit accessories -> Set the accessory status for this scene (Camera: Off / Desk Lamp: On) -> You can tap "Test Scene" to try it out -> Tap "Done" at the top right!
translations.同「家庭設定方式」-> 切換到「智慧」Tab -> 選擇「手動執行」-> 下方選: Same as "Home Settings" -> Switch to the "Automation" Tab -> Select "Run Manually" -> Choose device actions below (more options available due to native support) -> Continue adding other devices (lamp) -> "Save" to complete!
translations.回到新增捷徑頁面 -> 在下方選單輸入搜尋「米家」-> 加入對應的在米家設定的場: Go back to the Add Shortcut page -> In the bottom menu, type "Mi Home" -> Add the corresponding scene set in Mi Home, and turn off "Show When Run" to prevent Mi Home app from opening after execution.
translations.在config.json裡加入以上內容，IP 及 Token部分帶入上面取得的資: Add the above content into config.json, replacing the IP and Token sections with the information obtained earlier.
translations.在「智慧」Tab -> 「加入Siri」-> 選擇「目標場景」按「加入Siri」: In the "Automation" tab -> "Add to Siri" -> select the "Target Scene" and press "Add to Siri"
translations.在右側文件列表中找到並選擇 「 **數字_mihome.sqlite」** 這個: Find and select the file "**number_mihome.sqlite**" in the document list on the right side.
translations.大家可以根據自己的裝置需求跳著看。\n\n: You can skip around based on your device needs.
translations.如果像我一個就是個普通人那還是直接用米家最為方便上手，目前的使用習慣是回家、離開: If you are an ordinary user like me, it's still easiest to use the Mi Home app directly. My current habit is to trigger scene actions from the Notification Center shortcut widget when I arrive or leave home. The Shortcuts app combined with IFTTT is only used for notifications, just in case I sometimes forget.
translations.如果已啟動之後又更改了config.json內容的話可以改下：\n\n: If you have already started and then changed the content of config.json, you can modify it as follows:
translations.如果有技術能力可考慮使用第三方智慧裝置（如米家）搭配樹莓派做HomeBridge: If you have technical skills, consider using third-party smart devices (like Xiaomi) with a Raspberry Pi to run HomeBridge.
translations.如果要好的體驗就是得花大錢買有HomeKit標誌的電器（就可不需放台Mac做Ho: For a good experience, you need to spend a lot of money buying appliances with the HomeKit logo (so you don’t have to keep a Mac running as a HomeBridge server and can directly integrate perfectly with Apple’s native Home app). You also need to buy a HomePod, Apple TV, or iPad to act as a home hub. Both HomeKit-certified appliances and home hubs are not cheap!
translations.安裝完成後同上攝影機的步驟，前往 ~/.homebridge 資料夾，建立或編輯: After installation, follow the same steps as the camera and go to the ~/.homebridge folder to create or edit the config.json file. This time, just add the following inside the last }
translations.安裝完成後，我們需要取得攝影機的網路 **IP位址** 跟 **Token**: After installation, we need to obtain two pieces of information for the camera's network: the **IP address** and the **Token**.
Upload the exported SQLite file to <https://inloop.github.io/sqlite-viewer/>{:target="_blank"} to view its contents.
translations.左側會顯示你所有安裝的APP，找到米家的APP「AppDomain-com.xi: The left side will display all your installed apps. Find the Mi Home app "AppDomain-com.xiaomi.mihome" -> "Documents"
translations.很好找，只要google或在github 搜尋「mija 產品英文名 homeb: They are easy to find by googling or searching on GitHub for "mija product English name homebridge"; here are resources for two devices I use:
translations.快捷開關部分，可以從「我的」->「小元件」設定小工具元件！\n\n: For quick toggles, you can set up widget components from "Me" -> "Widgets"!
translations.我一共買了兩盞檯燈，一盞(Pro)放電腦桌工作用、另一盞放床頭當閱讀燈。\n\n: I bought two desk lamps in total: one (Pro) for my computer desk, and the other for bedside reading.
translations.所以才說捷徑名稱盡量設英文比較好\n\n: That's why it's better to name shortcuts in English whenever possible.
translations.所以本篇會分別介紹 **Apple HomeKit 使用** 、 **不支援Ap: This article will introduce **Using Apple HomeKit**, **How to connect non-HomeKit smart devices to HomeKit via third-party tools**, and **How to build a smart home using the Mi Home app (with IFTTT).**
translations.打開IFTTT、登入帳號後，切換到「My Applets」Tab，點右上角「+」:
Open IFTTT and log in, then switch to the "My Applets" tab and tap the "+" icon at the top right to add a new applet ->  
Click "+this" -> search for "Location" -> choose either entering or leaving.
translations.打開「iBackupViewer」，初次啟動會要你去 Mac「系統偏好設定」-:
Open "iBackupViewer." On first launch, it will prompt you to go to Mac "System Preferences" - "Security & Privacy" - "Privacy" - "+" - add "iBackupViewer."  
****If you have privacy concerns, you can disable network access for this software and remove it after use***
translations.打開米家APP → 攝影機 → 右上角「…」→設定→網路訊息，得到 **IP位址: Open the Mi Home app → Camera → Top right "…" → Settings → Network Info to get the **IP address**!
translations.打開系統內建的「 [捷徑](https://apps.apple.com/tw/: Open the built-in " [Shortcuts](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E6%8D%B7%E5%BE%91/id915249334){:target="_blank"} " app (if you can't find it, please search and download it from the App Store).
translations.找到家庭APP（如沒有請到App Store搜尋「家庭」安裝）\n: Find the Home app (if not installed, search for "Home" in the App Store and install it)
translations.按右上角「完成」儲存後，再回到「家庭」APP，可以看到「自動化」Tab 被打開可: After tapping "Done" in the top right corner to save, go back to the "Home" app, and you will see the "Automation" tab is now enabled and ready to use!
translations.掃描Pro檯燈底部HomeKit QRCode加入配件即可！\n: Scan the HomeKit QR code at the bottom of the Pro lamp to add the accessory!
translations.攝影機是比較棘手的裝置，花了些時間研究並整理了一下；希望有幫助到有需要的人！\n: The camera is a more tricky device. I spent some time researching and organizing the information; hope this helps those in need!
translations.智慧已經有了，現在我想要達成終極目標，回家自動關閉攝影機、開燈；離家自動開攝影機: The smart devices are set up, and now I want to achieve the ultimate goal: automatically turn off the camera and turn on the lights when I get home; automatically turn on the camera and turn off the lights when I leave.
translations.最後再打開 <http://aes.online-domain-tools.co: Finally, open the website <http://aes.online-domain-tools.com/>{:target="_blank"} to convert the **ZTOKEN** into the final **Token**.
translations.最近剛搬完家；有別於原本住的地方，天花板是辦公室輕鋼架燈，亮到要拔掉幾根燈管眼睛: Recently, I just moved; unlike my previous place with office-style ceiling lights that were so bright I had to unplug some tubes to make my eyes comfortable, the new place has decorative reflection lights. The brightness is a bit low for using the computer and reading, and after two weeks, my eyes feel drier and more uncomfortable. I initially planned to shop at IKEA, but considering light color and eye protection, I compared cost-performance and finally chose the Xiaomi desk lamp (plus I already had a Xiaomi smart camera, both are from the Mi Home series).
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有出現這些＆沒出現錯誤error訊息即表示設定成功！\n\n: If these appear and no error messages show up, it means the setup was successful!
translations.查看node.js npm套件管理工具是否安裝成功：顯示出版本號即表示成功！\n: Check if the node.js npm package manager is installed successfully: displaying the version number means success!
translations.步驟也如第三方APP，不過整合性更佳！使用原生「家庭」APP建立好自動化後也可以: The steps are similar to third-party apps, but with better integration! After setting up automation using the native "Home" app, you can also swipe to delete the automations created with third-party apps.
translations.現在你就可以從「家庭」APP中開關米家智慧攝影機囉！\n\n: Now you can turn the Xiaomi smart camera on and off directly from the Home app!
translations.由於米家不是Apple內建APP，所以要支援Siri語音控制就得另外設置：\n\: Since Mi Home is not a built-in Apple app, additional setup is required to support Siri voice control:
translations.當然網路上也有神人做法，自行買一塊樹莓派來玩，將樹莓派當成橋接器；但這涉及到太多: Of course, there are experts online who buy a Raspberry Pi to use as a bridge; however, this involves too much technical detail and will not be covered in this article.
translations.目前體驗雖沒達到目標理想，但已經離 **“智慧家庭”** 更進一步了！\n\n: Although the current experience hasn't reached the ideal goal, it is already one step closer to a **"smart home"**!
translations.相較下面介紹的米家，HomeKit的整合性相當高，可直接使用語音控制設定的配件、: Compared to the Mi Home described below, HomeKit offers much higher integration. You can directly use voice control to operate configured accessories and execute scenes without any extra setup.
translations.看字就好，這個就是\n\n: Just read the text, this is it.
translations.知道缺點後如果還想玩玩，可以繼續往下看或是跳到下一個直接使用米家的章節。\n\n: If you still want to try it after knowing the drawbacks, you can continue reading below or skip to the next chapter that directly uses Xiaomi's app.
translations.等待安裝完成後…HomeBridge工具就算裝完了！\n\n: After waiting for the installation to complete... the HomeBridge tool is now installed!
translations.米家 LED 智慧檯燈 (支援：米家)\n: Mi Home LED Smart Desk Lamp (Supported by: Mi Home)
translations.米家智慧攝影機及米家智慧檯燈、Homekit設定教學\n\n: Mi Home Security Camera and Mi Home Smart Desk Lamp, HomeKit Setup Guide
translations.米家智慧攝影機雲台版 1080P (支援：米家)\n: Mijia Smart Camera PTZ Version 1080P (Supported: Mijia)
translations.米家檯燈 Pro (支援：Apple HomeKit、米家)\n: Mi Home Desk Lamp Pro (Supports: Apple HomeKit, Mi Home)
translations.而且同樣支援顏色、光度調整！\n\n: And it also supports color and brightness adjustment!
translations.裝置綁定完成後回到「裝置」頁 -> 點「米家檯燈」進入 -> 點右下角「△」Ta: After binding the device, go back to the "Devices" page -> tap "Mi Home Desk Lamp" to enter -> tap the "△" tab at the bottom right -> tap "LAN Control" to enter settings -> turn on the switch to allow LAN (local network) control
translations.設定位置 -> 點擊「Create trigger」確定 -> 換點下面「+th: Set location -> Click "Create trigger" to confirm -> Then click "+that" below -> Search for "notification"
translations.詳細介紹可參考官網，兩盞都支援智慧控制、變色、調亮度、護眼，Pro版支援Appl: For detailed information, please refer to the official website. Both lamps support smart control, color changing, brightness adjustment, and eye protection. The Pro version supports Apple HomeKit and three-level angle adjustment. Based on current use, the functionality of a single lamp is quite satisfactory. The only drawback is that the Pro version’s angle adjustment only allows the base to rotate horizontally; the lamp itself cannot, so the light angle cannot be adjusted!
translations.透過 npm 安裝 HomeBridge套件：\n\n: Install the HomeBridge package via npm:
translations.這是最簡單的一部分，因為都是原生功能。\n\n: This is the simplest part because it uses native features.
translations.這時候再次回到「終端機」下以下命令啟動 HomeBridge\n\n: At this point, return to the "Terminal" and run the following command to start HomeBridge.
translations.這時候又要使用第三方APP了，我們使用IFTTT做GPS進入、離開的背景觸發器，: At this point, a third-party app is needed. We use IFTTT for GPS-based background triggers when entering or leaving. Search for "[IFTTT](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ifttt/id660944635){:target="_blank"}" in the App Store to download and install.
translations.這時候就可以選擇右上角「＋」使用「家庭」APP直接新增自動化腳本！！\n\n: At this point, you can choose the "+" button in the top right corner to directly add automation scripts using the "Home" app!!
translations.這時會出現HomeKit QRCode 讓您掃描加入配件（步驟如上面提到的，Ap: At this point, a HomeKit QR Code will appear for you to scan and add the accessory (the steps are as mentioned above for adding Apple HomeKit devices).
translations.這樣就能從通知中心快速執行場境、裝置囉！\n\n: This allows you to quickly execute scenes and devices from the Notification Center!
translations.這樣就設定好場囉～這時候在首頁點場景就換執行裡面所有配件的設定！\n\n: The scene is now set! At the homepage, tap Scenes to execute all the settings for the accessories inside!
translations.這邊ㄧ樣要使用GPS感應方式， **如果上述新增場景用的就是「離開或到達某地」，: Here, the GPS sensing method is also required. **If the scene you added above uses "Leaving or Arriving at a Location," you can skip the following setup!**
translations.這邊我使用的第三方串接APP是： [myHome Plus](https://a: Here, the third-party integration app I used is: [myHome Plus](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/myhome-plus-control-for-nest-wemo-and-homekit/id1050479330){:target="_blank"}
translations.這邊遇到一個困惑點，就是我在米家新增設備中找不到長得一樣的米家檯燈，答案就是：\: Here I encountered a confusion: I couldn't find the identical Xiaomi desk lamp in the Mi Home app when adding a new device. The answer is:
translations.這點不得不吐槽一下這個糟糕的整合性，原生米家APP是無法做這項設定的；所以請到A: I have to complain about this poor integration. The native Mi Home app cannot perform this setting; so please search for the "[Yeelight](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/yeelight/id977125608){:target="_blank"}" app in the App Store to download & install.
translations.選備份 **不要勾替本機備份加密** ，點「立即備份」\n\n: Select backup **Do NOT check Encrypt local backup**, then click "Back Up Now"
translations.選擇「Send a rich notification from the IFT: Select "Send a rich notification from the IFTTT app":
translations.還有一個快捷小撇步，就是在上拉控制選單直接點房子形狀的按鈕快速操作HomeKit: One handy shortcut is to swipe up the control center and tap the house-shaped button to quickly control HomeKit/execute scenes (mode can be switched at the top right)!
translations.開啟APP -> 直接使用米家帳號登入 -> 增加裝置 -> 米家檯燈 -> 照: Open the app -> Log in directly with your Mi Home account -> Add device -> Mi Home desk lamp -> Follow the instructions to rebind the lamp to the Yeelight app
translations.除了以上本身就支援的智慧裝置，那不支援Apple HomeKit的裝置是不是就完:
Besides the smart devices that natively support Apple HomeKit, does that mean devices without HomeKit support cannot be controlled through the Home app at all?  
This section will guide you step-by-step on how to add unsupported devices (camera, standard desk lamp) into the Home app!
translations.離家、回家時發推播提醒，手機按一下觸發操作(已現有裝置沒辦法達到理想的自動化目標: Send push notifications when leaving or arriving home, and trigger actions with a tap on the phone (existing devices cannot achieve the ideal automation).
translations.首先ㄧ樣用「終端機」下命令安裝這MijiaCamera這個npm套件\n\n: First, use the Terminal to run the command to install the MijiaCamera npm package.
translations.首先到「我的」-> 「實驗室功能」->「iOS 捷徑」-> 「將米家場景加入捷勁: First go to "Me" -> "Lab Features" -> "iOS Shortcuts" -> "Add Mi Home Scenes to Shortcuts"
translations.點擊右上角「+」加入配近\n: Click the "+" icon at the top right to add a nearby device
translations.點擊右上角「+」建立捷徑 -> 點右上完成下方的設定按鈕 -> 名稱 -> 輸入: Click the "+" button at the top right to create a shortcut -> Click the "Done" button at the top right after setting below -> Name -> Enter a name (English is recommended, as it will be used later)
translations.點選通知就會在背景自動執行場景\n\n: Tapping the notification will automatically run the scene in the background
